title: phlegmariurus tauri
intro: Phlegmariurus tauri, also known as the Southern maidenhair, is a species of climbing fern native to Australia and New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus tauri include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, tinctures, and topical creams to take advantage of its therapeutic properties.
